chapter_title.en: Chapter 103 – Buying the stolen (goods) and the betrayal

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/271)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/271)
text: مَنِ اشْتَرَى سَرِقَةً وَ هُوَ يَعْلَمُ فَقَدْ شَرِكَ فِي عَارِهَا وَ إِثْمِهَا .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Al Nahdy, from Ibn Abu Najran, from one of his companions,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who buys stolen (goods) and he knows, so he has participated in its shame and in its sin’.
en.sarwar: 6. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from al-Nahdiy from ibn abu Najran from certain persons of his people who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Whoever buys stolen goods when he knows it, he shares its shame and sin.’”
